overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a character walking through a futuristic urban waterfront district at night. The character traverses a paved promenade beneath elevated transit structures, passing neon signage and digital displays before ascending stairs to an upper plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered waterfront promenade with corporate signage and mural

events.description: character moves from open promenade into the covered area beneath the overpass structure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront promenade past the RM corporate sign and approaching the large mural wall

entered.detail: large circular green and white corporate sign with RM letters mounted on building facade
tall wall featuring large artistic painting of trees and foliage with red accents
calm reflective pool or canal running alongside the walkway with glass railing
futuristic elevated transit structure with metallic framework spanning overhead
sculpted alien trees with broad canopies and twisted trunks lining the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a paved waterfront promenade at night, passing beneath a large RM corporate sign. The area features a mix of natural and artificial elements with sculpted trees, a reflective water feature, and a large mural wall ahead. The space transitions from open to semi-covered as the character approaches the overpass structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath transit bridge with curved water edge

events.description: character passes the blue information kiosk and continues along the curved water path
character briefly stops walking to look out over the water toward the distant illuminated buildings

agents.ego_description: walking under the bridge structure along the water's edge, pausing momentarily to observe the distant city lights across the water

entered.detail: blue illuminated terminal with holographic display showing directional information and symbols
futuristic illuminated structures visible across the water with glowing windows

segments.scene_description: The character walks beneath the massive overpass structure, with the bridge framework dominating the upper portion of the view. A blue information kiosk stands near the water's edge. The character pauses briefly to look across the water at the distant illuminated buildings before continuing along the curved path.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper plaza entrance with illuminated stairs and digital displays

events.description: character turns right away from the water and begins ascending the wide staircase
character reaches the top of the stairs and approaches the group of civilians near the digital billboard

agents.ego_description: turning away from the waterfront and climbing the illuminated stairs toward the upper commercial plaza where other people are gathered

notable_agents.action: two civilians standing and conversing near the large digital display at the top of the stairs

entered.detail: wide illuminated staircase with red geometric patterned side panels and embedded lighting
large glowing screen displaying colorful abstract graphics and advertisements

segments.scene_description: The character turns away from the water and approaches a wide illuminated staircase leading upward. As the character ascends, a large digital billboard becomes visible at the top, where two civilians stand near the display. The area transitions from the lower waterfront to an upper plaza level with more dense vegetation and commercial lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic waterfront district that transitions from an open promenade into a sheltered urban underpass and finally ascends to an elevated plaza. It begins with the character walking along a paved walkway past sculpted trees and a reflective water feature, moving beneath a large corporate sign toward a mural wall. As the character advances, the environment shifts into a semi-covered space dominated by the massive framework of an overpass, where a blue information kiosk stands by the water's edge. The scene then turns away from the illuminated distant skyline and approaches a wide, glowing staircase. Finally, the camera ascends the stairs toward a large digital billboard and waiting civilians, emerging from the lower waterfront into a brightly lit upper plaza filled with dense vegetation.
